name: War Banner
equip: All friendly units at this location get +1 strength.
stored: Units initiating a strength contest at this location get +2 strength.
text: Equip: +1 strength to friendly units here. Stored: +2 strength to attackers here.
flavor: It flew above a hundred fields.

name: Merchant Ledger
stored: Generates 2 gold at start of your turn.
text: Stored at a location: gain 2 gold per turn.

name: Compass
equip: Equipped unit can move through one blocked edge.
text: Ignore one blocked edge when moving.
flavor: It always knows the way home.

name: Philosopher's Stone
equip: Equipped unit gains +2 to all stats.

name: Spy Glass
equip: Equipped unit can look at face-down traps at its location.

name: Holy Relic
stored: All Spiritual units at this location get +1 charisma.
text: +3 charisma to Spiritual (equip) or +1 charisma to Spiritual (stored).

name: Siege Engine
text: All enemy units at target adjacent location get -2 strength until end of turn. Must be stored at a location to use.

name: Trade Goods
stored: Generates 1 gold at start of your turn.

name: Crowning Jewel
equip: Equipped Politician gets +2 charisma. When this unit wins a charisma contest gain 2 gold.
text: +2 charisma to Politicians; gold on charisma contest wins.
